name: Chinese Style Country Ribs (Crockpot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, orange marmalade, catsup, and crushed garlic in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Brush both sides of the ribs with the marinade mixture.
3. Place the ribs in the Crockpot.
4. Pour any remaining marinade over all the ribs.
5. Cover the Crockpot and cook on Low for 8-10 hours, ensuring the heat is turned off when the cooking time is complete.
